svg.title: Red maple leaf shape and seasonal timing
svg.desc: Three-lobed maple leaf outline and notes for flowers and samaras in the Mid-Atlantic.
svg.text: Red maple (Acer rubrum) - quick ID sketch
Opposite branching; typically 3-5 palmate lobes; sinuses V-shaped to shallow; red petioles common.
Maryland: red flowers often Feb-Mar; paired samaras mature by late spring.
